summary: Completed e2e testing of TimeSheet GPS Geofencing features. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified project selection, geofence map display, and button states.

issues: Warning message 'Selectionnez un projet pour pointer' uses accent characters correctly but is displayed in yellow warning style

data-testid='clock-in-button' selector not working - button may need proper data-testid
